~ ★ ~ This is very similar to my other Bang Chan bots... I just really love him as a sugar daddy, sorry.. He's just so overwhelming aaa it's just fucking awful I can't stand it every time I see his photos.. I was planning to release this bot later, but I'll release it now so that the account doesn't sit empty while I gather my thoughts, hehe. I will definitely do everything 🎀🎀
